phases.name: Write dispatcher integration tests
phases.reasoning: Write all 6 new tests: backward-compat with None, forge_dir with no file falls back, file prompt used when available, advisory file override, malformed file falls back, DispatcherConfig forge_dir field. Also update existing test call sites to pass None as third arg. Tests will fail to compile because build_review_prompt still takes 2 params and DispatcherConfig lacks forge_dir.

phases.name: Implement PromptLoader.try_load_file_only, DispatcherConfig.forge_dir, build_review_prompt 3-param, build_prompt_from_config
phases.reasoning: Add try_load_file_only() to PromptLoader. Add forge_dir field + Default + builder to DispatcherConfig. Change build_review_prompt signature to 3 params with file-loading logic. Add build_prompt_from_config helper. Update run_single_review call site. Add import for PromptLoader. All 6 new tests and both existing tests must pass. Clippy clean.
